content.en:
"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, this is the Realm Source Core, it is a special treasure condensed by the Half-Step Ancestor with a Realm, once it is detonated, it is equivalent to a Realm explosion, even if you are afraid, you will fall and die, if you continue to hunt me down, everyone will die together!"

The Dark Red Domain Ancestor went crazy.

The treasure of the Boundary Source Core, which ordinary half-step ancestors would not refine, is the treasure she once entered the ruins of a half-step ancestor and obtained, and it is also her most important killer weapon.

However, there is no way to control this kind of thing, and if it detonates, she herself will be affected.

"Then you detonate it!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He also knew very well that once it was detonated, it would be enough to kill an ordinary five-step invincible domain ancestor, and even if he wanted to kill him, it was still much worse.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian continued to shoot, and the golden mangs penetrated through, instantly piercing through the Dark Red Domain Ancestor.

On the verge of death, the Dark Red Domain Ancestor detonated the Boundary Source Core.

Distance.

One by one, the Supreme Domain Ancestors fled frantically, fleeing into the distance as fast as they could.

"Run, the Dark Red Domain Ancestor is crazy, she actually wants to attract the Boundary Source Core!"

"The scope of the boundary source core is too large, if you can't escape, then wait for death!"

The Supreme Domain Ancestors, who were far away from Ye Tian and the Dark Red Domain Ancestors, were still able to escape at this time, while some of the nearby Supreme Domain Ancestors were confused.

The detonation took almost no time, it was detonated in an instant.

Airplanes!!!!!

Most of the treasure land was covered by the power of the Boundary Source Core, and it was almost instantaneous.

Suddenly, countless spaces were annihilated, and some of the Supreme Domain Ancestors who had no time to dodge were annihilated by the Supreme Domain Body, and they couldn't even keep their souls, holy relics, and holy soldiers, as if they had been erased from this heaven and earth in an instant.

And Ye Tian naturally didn't stupidly resist head-on, but used the Void Escape Holy Technique to sneak into the deep void.

Of course, even if he dived into the deep void, the power of the Boundary Source Nuclear Explosion would bombard his body through the layers of void.

But Ye Tian has the ancestral armor and ancestral skills, and his defense is very terrifying, so he will be fine.

The explosion of the boundary source nuclear annihilated the area for several hours before it gradually dissipated.

Wow!

A figure walked out from the depths of the void, and it was Ye Tian.

At this time, he was a little embarrassed and injured, after all, this was a big killing weapon that could kill the general five-step invincible domain ancestor combat power, and it was naturally a threat to him, if it weren't for the help of the Void Escape Holy Technique and the Ancestral Armor, he was afraid that he would also be hit hard.

Now, he's just injured.

"Immortal Holy Technique!"

Under the recovery of the Immortal Saint Technique, Ye Tian's injuries recovered at an extremely fast speed.

He looked around, there was no one Supreme Domain Ancestor in this area, but the void of this treasure land was rapidly recovering, after all, this void even he couldn't understand the origin, and it was naturally impossible for the boundary source core to destroy this treasure land.

Whoa!!!

A Famous Supreme Domain Ancestor entered the treasure land again, but the number was much less, which shows how many Supreme Domain Ancestors died.

Soon after, a powerful aura descended on this treasure land.

"What about the Immortal Holy Gate's Supreme Domain Ancestor?"

"Where is the Strongest Domain Ancestor of our Dark Holy Gate?"

"Damn, why can't many of our Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Firmament Holy Gate be contacted, who killed them?"

These Supreme Domain Ancestors were all the top five powerful existences of the major Holy Gates, and there were even Supreme Domain Ancestors who ranked first and second.

At this time, some of the remnants of the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Great Holy Gates hurriedly reported to these powerful existences in the top five of the Supreme Power List.

"It was the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor who killed the Wu Xiu Domain Ancestor!"

One of the Forbidden Holy Gate's supreme domain ancestors said.

When these top five supreme domain ancestors on the supreme list knew the situation, they immediately looked at Ye Tian angrily one by one.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, you have gone too far, you have killed so many Holy Gate Supreme Domain Ancestors!"

The Forbidden Holy Gate's Supreme Domain Ancestor, who was second on the Supreme Domain Ancestor, said coldly.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "I only killed a little bit of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the other Supreme Domain Ancestors all died under the Boundary Source Core of the Immortal Holy Gate Dark Red Domain Ancestor!

The Immortal Holy Gate's No. 1 Saint Cloud Domain Ancestor said angrily: "Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, if you hadn't hunted down and killed the Dark Red Domain Ancestor, would she have sacrificed the Realm Source Core?"

"Anyway, those Supreme Domain Ancestors were killed by her, this is a fact! According to what you said, two people fight, and one of them can't beat them, knowing that they will definitely die, they can massacre them on a large scale? So, if an invincible Domain Ancestor of our Battle Gate offends the ancestor of your Immortal Holy Gate, and knows that he is going to die, he can slaughter countless creatures in the Dark Holy Domain, and even slaughter the Supreme Domain Ancestors of other Holy Gates, as well as the Holy Gifters and Ancestor Descendants, and then he doesn't need to be responsible?"

Ye Tian made an analogy.

"You're a fallacy!"

The Saint Cloud Domain Ancestor hurriedly said.

"That's the truth, I'm right, the Dark Red Domain Ancestor wants to kill me, and I will kill her, which is not wrong. She is not my opponent, so she used the Boundary Source Core to die together, and also wiped out a large number of Supreme Domain Ancestors, but instead of blaming the Dark Red Domain Ancestor, you blame me, it's really ridiculous!"

Ye Tian continued.

At this time, many of the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Holy Gate were said by Ye Tian to look at the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Immortal Holy Gate.

Of course, they also didn't have a good attitude towards Ye Tian, and they were also very angry with Ye Tian, after all, the supreme domain ancestors of the other Holy Gates had indeed fallen into Ye Tian's hands.

And the reason that really made these Supreme Domain Ancestors dare not make a move against Ye Tian was undoubtedly Ye Tian's strength.

They had already learned Ye Tian's approximate strength from the mouths of other Supreme Domain Ancestors, and they knew two ancestral skills, and the battle was comparable to that of a five-step invincible domain ancestor.

Such strength is terrifying!

Even the Holy Cloud Domain Ancestor had to admit that he was far from being Ye Tian's opponent, although he had an opportunity after entering the Holy Soul Realm, his current strength was comparable to the six-step Invincible Domain Ancestor, if it was coupled with the hole cards given by the Immortal Holy Gate, it was enough to increase his strength to the extreme of the six-step Invincible Domain Ancestor's combat power, but it was not the opponent of the Five-Step Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Even if the top two Supreme Domain Ancestors of the major Holy Gates unite together, they may be able to compete with the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, but this is meaningless.

It is also true that it is difficult for them to kill Ye Tian, but it is easy for Ye Tian to find an opportunity and break them one by one, so they are the ones who are worried.

Moreover, they didn't come to this treasure land this time to avenge those dead Supreme Domain Ancestors, but for the Holy Sands!

Many Supreme Domain Ancestors did not make a move, and waited for the appearance of the Holy Sands one by one.

They don't believe that there is only one St. Sands, and as long as they wait slowly, they can wait for other St. Sands.

Ye Tian also continued to wait, what he wanted was not a grain of Saint Sands, but a lot of Saint Sands.

In that case, he would be able to complete the second qualitative transformation of his future holy soul.
